revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-1-250

Luminous Range (of a light)

The maximum distance at which a light can be seen, as determined by the luminous intensity of the light, the atmospheric transmission factor and the threshold of illuminance on the eye of the observer (2-1-390).

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Luminous Range}}
